hero.subtitle: Itineraya turns your travel dreams into personalized itineraries. Tell us your destination and let AI do the rest.

how.title: From idea to trip in 3 steps
how.subtitle: No spreadsheets, no late-night research. Plan your adventure in minutes.
how.step1Desc: Tell us where you want to go. A city, a country, or just 'beach in summer'.
how.step2Desc: Adjust dates, budget, travel style and preferences. Packed schedule or total relaxation.
how.step3Desc: AI builds a day-by-day plan with maps, schedules, bookings and local tips.

features.title: Everything you need to travel stress-free
features.subtitle: Cutting-edge tech with the warmth of a personal travel agent.
features.aiDesc: Our AI engine analyzes thousands of real-time signals to craft unique itineraries tailored to you.
features.mapDesc: Visualize your day-by-day route with built-in maps, directions and travel times between stops.
features.seasonDesc: Get recommendations based on the time of year: festivals, events and seasonal activities.
features.budgetDesc: AI balances quality and cost, suggesting alternatives so you travel your way without surprises.
features.worldDesc: From iconic cities to hidden corners. Works anywhere in the world.
features.shareDesc: Share your itinerary with friends, let them vote on activities and plan together.

testimonials.title: What our travelers say
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of people already trust Itineraya to plan their adventures.
testimonials.t1Text: I planned my Bali trip in under 5 minutes. The itinerary was perfect, with activities I'd never have found on my own.
testimonials.t2Text: Amazing how the AI understands exactly what I'm looking for. My route through Japan was unforgettable, all perfectly organized.
testimonials.t3Text: The restaurants recommended for my Italy trip were spectacular. Itineraya understands what it means to travel with all your senses.

finalCta.title: Ready for your next trip?
finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of travelers already planning with Itineraya. Your next adventure is one click away.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to keep planning your trips
auth.signupSubtitle: Create your free account in seconds
auth.terms: By continuing, you accept our Terms and Privacy Policy.
auth.checkEmailHelp: . If you don't see it, check your spam folder or resend it.
auth.resendSent: Email resent. Check your inbox in a few seconds.
auth.resendCooldown: Please wait a few seconds before resending.
auth.resendFail: Couldn't resend the email. Please try again.
auth.accountCreated: Account created! Check your email to confirm.
auth.notVerifiedYet: We haven't detected the verification yet. Check your inbox.

emailConfirmed.title: Email verified!
emailConfirmed.bodyPost: account is active. Sign in to start building amazing travel itineraries.

checkoutReturn.title: Welcome aboard!
checkoutReturn.body: Your plan is active. Enjoy your new features and start planning your next adventure.

pricing.title: Choose how you travel
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade whenever you want more itineraries, AI and advanced tools.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: To kick off your first adventure

welcome.ageSubtitle: We'll tailor recommendations to your profile.
welcome.langTitle: Which language do you want to use Itineraya in?

dashboard.newTripDesc: Tell us where, and our AI does the rest
dashboard.empty: No trips yet. Create your first one and start the adventure!

onboarding.metaTitle: Tell us about your trip – Itineraya
onboarding.destTitle: Where do you want to go?
onboarding.destSubtitle: A city, a country or a region. Whatever you dream of.
onboarding.datesSubtitle: Pick a start and an end date.
onboarding.timeHint: Optional · helps tune the first and last day
onboarding.compSubtitle: We'll tailor the plan to your group.
onboarding.styleTitle: What kind of trip are you after?
onboarding.stylePh: e.g. I want to discover temples and street food, with some nature.
onboarding.avoidPh: e.g. Avoid seafood and rides over 4 hours.
onboarding.styleMultiSubtitle: Pick everything that fits. You can choose several.
onboarding.styleMultiHint: Multi-select · tailors the itinerary to your interests
onboarding.accomSubtitle: If you already booked, we'll skip hotel suggestions.

trip.editAssistantLocked: Available on Traveler and Explorer plans
trip.loadingSubtitle: Our AI is crafting a unique itinerary just for you

share.title: Share your trip
share.subtitle: Anyone with the link can view it, no account needed.
share.text: Check out my trip to {{destination}} on Itineraya
share.publicHint: Only the itinerary is shared. Your account stays private.
share.instagramHint: Link copied — paste it into your Instagram story or bio

publicTrip.ctaTitle: Create your own itinerary for free
publicTrip.ctaSubtitle: In under a minute. Our AI designs a unique trip for you.

assistant.greetingWithTrip: Hi! ✈️ I'm your travel assistant for **{{destination}}**. How can I help? I can suggest places, restaurants, routes or practical tips.
assistant.greetingNoTrip: Hi! ✈️ I'm your Itineraya travel assistant. Create a trip so I can help with personalized recommendations.
assistant.upgradeBodyPre: The AI travel assistant is available on the
assistant.upgradeBodyPost: plans. Upgrade to get personalized recommendations for your next destination.
assistant.panelGreeting: Hi! I'm your editing assistant for your trip to **{{destination}}**. Tell me what changes you want and I'll apply them to the itinerary. For example: "swap day 3 for something more chill" or "remove the early-morning activities".
assistant.panelPh: e.g. swap day 2 for something more relaxed

newTrip.title: How would you like to start?
newTrip.subtitle: Choose how to create your next trip
newTrip.knowTitle: I know where I want to go
newTrip.knowDesc: Tell us your destination and we'll build the itinerary.
newTrip.inspireDesc: Answer a few questions and we'll recommend 3 perfect destinations.
newTrip.copilotDesc: Switch on the live copilot for on-the-go suggestions.

inspire.loadingDesc: Our AI is analyzing thousands of options for you
inspire.resultsDesc: Ranked by match with your profile

tripType.title: What kind of trip are you looking for?
tripType.subtitle: You can pick more than one

region.title: Where would you like to travel?
region.subtitle: Choose the geographic scope

copilot.title: Travel copilot
copilot.subtitle: You're already on the trip. I'll suggest things to do right now, nearby, with realistic transport.
copilot.greeting: Hi! You're in {{destination}}. Tell me what you feel like and I'll suggest what to do now, nearby, with realistic transport.
copilot.inputPh: What should I do now? Where to eat nearby?
